steps.title: Find the location detail the question targets
steps.content: The question asks for the choice that emphasizes the LOCATION of the figures in The Space in Which We Travel. The notes provide the key detail: the two young girls float “in the center of the canvas.” You need the choice that highlights this spatial positioning.

steps.title: Match the location detail to the choices
steps.content: Choice C directly emphasizes the location by stating “in the center of the canvas.” The other choices focus on size (A), mood (B), and color (D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
